title: Provisional Accreditation by POEA
content:
Yes. A provisional accreditation may be granted for a period of ninety days for a principal that substantially meets the accreditation requirements.

The expiration of the agency's license shall not cause the automatic expiration of the accreditation. It shall only be suspended until the renewal of the license.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
